creator: iron.udjin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Bernard Spil from comment #2)

I didn't submit bug report to jira.mariadb.org yet because I don't know for sure is it OS problem or mariadb.

First what I did when it happened first time - I wiped data dir then started mysql-server (for initialize data dirs) and restored all databases from backup. But after ~12 hours I've been started getting the same crashes.
